scripts.test: TEST_SERVER=0 TEST_BROWSER_DRIVER=puppeteer METEOR_PACKAGE_DIRS='../:../../' TEST_BROWSER_DRIVER=puppeteer meteor test-packages --once --raw-logs --driver-package meteortesting:mocha ../
scripts.test:watch: TEST_SERVER=0  TEST_BROWSER_DRIVER=puppeteer METEOR_PACKAGE_DIRS='../:../../'  TEST_WATCH=1 meteor test-packages --raw-logs --driver-package meteortesting:mocha ../
scripts.test:browser: TEST_SERVER=0  METEOR_PACKAGE_DIRS='../:../../'  TEST_WATCH=1 meteor test-packages --raw-logs --driver-package meteortesting:mocha ../
